headline: EQT Debt Tender Reshapes Balance Sheet And Future Cash Flow Profile
summary: EQT Corporation launched a large tender offer to repurchase a significant portion of its outstanding senior notes. The company also plans to redeem additional debt, which together represent a material shift in its capital structure. The move affects EQT's leverage profile, interest expense and financial flexibility, and has not been addressed in prior coverage here. EQT (NYSE:EQT), currently trading at $61.83, has seen substantial share price gains, with the stock up 15.7% year to date and...

headline: Is EQT (EQT) Still Attractive After A 110.6% Three Year Share Price Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether EQT is still reasonably priced after its recent run, you are not alone. This article will walk through what its current valuation might be telling you. EQT shares last closed at US$61.83, with returns of 0.4% over 7 days, 8.9% over 30 days, 15.7% year to date and 27.4% over 1 year, while the 3 year return stands at 110.6% and the 5 year return is described as very large. Recent coverage of EQT has focused on its role as a major US natural gas producer and how...
